'''Woteba''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]] of [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] between [[Reecee/Legends|Reecee]] and [[Adumar/Legends|Adumar]].

==History==
It was discovered in 10 BBY. Under the terms of the [[Qoribu Truce]], the [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] of [[the Colony]] agreed to settle Woteba and thirteen other [[Planet/Legends|planets]] in the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]] rather than continuing expansion into [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] space. Woteba was settled by the artistic [[Saras]] hive.

The planet was covered in bogs, marshes, mountains, and conifer forests of [[hamogoni tree]]s. Woteba also had a unusual [[Moirestone|stone]] that was [[Mine/Legends|mined]] by the Killiks. When the planet was hit by the nova that formed the Utegetu Nebula, all animal life was wiped out, but plant life was restored within two years by the defense system.

The planet seemed a paradise for Killik colonization, but the planet had an ancient environmental defense system that attacked them anytime they interfered with the ecosystem, destroying both structures and living beings with a corrosive substance known as [[Fizz (acid)|Fizz]].

The Killiks believed the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] had purposefully sent them to Woteba to fall victim to the Fizz, but this was not true, merely a lie of the [[Gorog|Dark Nest]].

In [[36 ABY]], the Killiks abandoned the Nebula for fourteen [[nest ship]]s built in the [[Tusken's Eye]], alongside the nest ship of the Dark Nest. This fleet captured the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']] in preparation for expansion into Chiss space.
